titleStmt.title: SII 37.268: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 268. (A.R. No. B 374 of 1940-41.) Bhūtamāpuram, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in the centre of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Vaiśākha śu. 15, corresponding to 1539 A.D., May 3, Saturday.

Incomplete. It mentions the god Chennakēśava of the village Būtumōpūru situated in Rēnāṭi-sīma to the north of the Pinākini river included in Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma and the names of certain Vipravinōdis of Kāśyapa gōtra.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District., Part II, No. 132.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . svasti jayāddyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1461 Agunēṭi vikāri saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 15 lu . śrīmadrā
jādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī Accutadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajra siṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai
pṛdhvi sāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu gaṁḍikōṭa
sīmalōnu pināki nadiki vuttaraṁ rēnāṭisīmalōnu būtumō
pūri grāmaṁ . śrī canakēśvaradēvara divya śrī pādapadmālaku
kāsyapagōtṛlaina vipravinōdi pedagōviṁdayagāru veṁga
ḷapakomāruṁḍu nalagōviṁdaya valabhaya komāruḍu
cinavalabhaya kuṁḍivalabhaya komāruḍu valabhayānu gūḍi vi
pravinō
Digital edition of SII 37.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
